locations_inspected.name: Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC
findings: Estimated Remaining Useful Life: 7 years (overall); 0 years (roofing section)
Roof Deck Attachment: B - Nails (6" o.c.)
deficiencies: Multiple areas of ponding water observed on flat roof sections

recommendations.description: Visible roof deck sagging and water damage indicating structural concern - immediate assessment; restrict access to affected area pending evaluation
Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials - maintain minimum 36-inch clearance in front of all electrical panels per NEC Article 110.26
Hood suppression system in kitchen area has expired - complete annual inspection of kitchen hood suppression system per NFPA 96 Section 12.2
Exterior lighting inadequate in parking area and loading dock - add additional lighting to maintain minimum 1 foot-candle at ground level in exterior areas
HVAC rooftop units show signs of deferred maintenance - establish quarterly preventive maintenance program for all mechanical equipment
Hot work permit program not formally documented - implement written hot work permit program per NFPA 51B; train all affected personnel

overall_assessment.summary: Property shows mixed conditions with overall roof condition rated Excellent but roofing section rated Severe with 0 years remaining useful life; multiple deficiencies noted including ponding water, poor decking, and parapet wall cracking. Several critical and necessary recommendations identified across structural, electrical, and fire protection categories.
